title: ricinocarpus alternifolius
intro: Ricinocarpus alternifolius, also known as the "Ricinocarpus plant" or "Kutki," is a plant species native to the Himalayan region of India. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus alternifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough, and boost the immune system. Ricinocarpus alternifolius is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
